name: Marketing Site
styleGuide: Brand Voice: Friendly and direct. No jargon. Use short sentences. Prefer active voice. Avoid exclamation marks except for errors and confirmations.
appContext: PayAnalytics is a B2B SaaS platform used by HR and compensation teams to analyse pay equity. Audience: HR analysts, compensation managers, and DEI leads. Translations should use formal register and treat statistical/HR terms (e.g. 'pay gap', 'regression analysis', 'compensation band') as terms of art — keep them precise rather than colloquial.
